promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next unresolved operator-ordering axis-note parent after the Axis-3 geometry reduction.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the usable operator-language scaffold, loop-word probe packet, Rosetta scope rule, and the live Axis-4/Axis-5 conflict zones.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: Existing A2-mid batches were used to keep current Axis-4 canon, alias-only topology scope, candidate stage families, and evidence-side directional interpretation distinct from the older note's stronger definitional claims.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred as the next dedicated anti-conflation sibling once the broader Axis-4 QIT note was reduced.

raw_source_reread_reason: A fresh reread of the raw note was used to preserve exact 'Axis-4 (QIT definition)', 'Rosetta only', explicit loop-word, and invariant-check wording.

candidate_items.name: QIT_NATIVE_AXIS4_PROBE_FRAMING_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest disciplined framing in the note while stripping away the direct Axis-4 definition claim.

candidate_items.name: OPERATOR_ORDERING_LOOPWORD_AND_INVARIANT_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the note's most practically reusable test packet while leaving theorem-level closure claims unresolved.

candidate_items.name: ROSETTA_HUMAN_VERIFICATION_ONLY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the source's clearest scope guard and prevents Rosetta from descending into kernel naming authority.

candidate_items.name: EXPLICIT_QUBIT_CHANNEL_MENU_AS_CANDIDATE_STAGE_FUEL
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest channel-level concreteness without turning it into a fixed stage-space law.

quarantined_items.name: AXIS4_EQUALS_UNITARY_NONUNITARY_ORDERING_DEFINITION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Later canon keeps loop order in the probe lane and does not let this note's definition settle Axis-4.

quarantined_items.name: FIXED_LEGACY_LABEL_AND_TERRAIN_STAGE_LOCK
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Legacy labels and terrain names remain overlay or lineage material rather than stable stage identities.

quarantined_items.name: AXIS5_AS_DRIVE_ACTIVATION_AMPLITUDE_OVERLAY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The note's Axis-5 overlay remains live conflict material and cannot descend through an Axis-4 reduction.

quarantined_items.name: EXACTLY_ONE_MINIMAL_CLOSED_CYCLE_AS_SETTLED_THEOREM
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The note's closure theorem language outruns current evidence and probe posture.

quarantined_items.name: STITCHED_TOPOLOGY_AND_STAGE_IDENTITY_COLLAPSE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The file's internal register shift from no-topology-yet to explicit `SU(2) ~ S^3` / Hopf attachment must stay visible rather than normalized.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the note's strongest probe-design and scope-guard value without importing its stronger definitional or label-lock claims.
They remain small, comparison-ready, and explicitly downstream of current Axis-4 and topology fences.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain direct axis-semantic, stage-identity, or theorem-strength overclaims rather than clean reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them explicitly, but not to promote them into active law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after reading the companion A2-mid refinement process.
Used current Axis-4, topology, and evidence A2-mid packets only as comparison anchors.
A fresh raw-source reread was used because the reduction depends on exact definitional and scope-boundary wording in the source.
